testcase.name: test_lkp_bulk_today

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> assert False + where False = isinstance({'total': 4, 'total_with_lkp': 0, 'total_without_lkp': 4, 'work_orders': [{'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint24_new_features.py:58: in test_lkp_bulk_today assert isinstance(data, list), f"Expected list, got: {type(data)}" E AssertionError: Expected list, got: <class 'dict'> E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'total': 4, 'total_with_lkp': 0, 'total_without_lkp': 4, 'work_orders': [{'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}, {'has_lkp': False, 'latest_lkp_id': None, 'latest_lkp_number': None, 'latest_version': None, ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_create_shift_handover
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint24_new_features.py:79: in test_create_shift_handover assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Status: {resp.status_code}, Body: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Status: 400, Body: {"detail":"shift_id wajib diisi","status":400} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_material_reservations
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint24_new_features.py:86: in test_get_material_reservations assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
